scripts.dev: node node_modules/electron/install.js && node scripts/generate-katex-css.js && electron-vite dev
scripts.preview: node node_modules/electron/install.js && node scripts/generate-katex-css.js && electron-vite preview
scripts.dist: node node_modules/electron/install.js && node scripts/generate-katex-css.js && electron-vite build && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.typecheck: node scripts/generate-katex-css.js && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.web.json
scripts.test:e2e: node node_modules/electron/install.js && node scripts/generate-katex-css.js && playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:ui: node node_modules/electron/install.js && node scripts/generate-katex-css.js && playwright test --ui
scripts.test:e2e:electron: node node_modules/electron/install.js && node scripts/generate-katex-css.js && electron-vite build && playwright test --config=playwright.electron.config.ts
scripts.verify: pnpm format && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm typecheck:e2e && pnpm test && pnpm test:e2e && pnpm build
